series_metadata.series_description: These records capture information from reports generated by the multi-agency Drug Recognition Experts (DRE) when evaluating suspects/subjects suspected of using controlled substances in violation of the law. The reports are generated from tablets issued to each officer in the program and are stored on a remote server by a contracted vendor.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: five (5) years current year. Reports are held on server of a contracted vendor funded through National Highway Transportation and Safety Administration (NHTSA)
